NAVAREA XIX 45/20



IT WILL BE ACTIVITY WEST OF ANDOYA TEST CENTER IN THE PERIODE FROM 11 TO 15 MAY BETWEEN 1800 TO 0000 UTC
BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA:


A. 69-17.50N 015-58.50E
